description_long: This motorcycle features a classic design with a red fuel tank, brown leather seat, and silver metallic frame. The wheels are large with prominent spokes and thick black tires, giving it a robust and sturdy appearance. The front includes a headlight, handlebars with black grips, and a visible front suspension fork. The engine is detailed with silver and gray components, and the exhaust pipe runs along the right side. The rear fender is silver with a small red taillight, and the overall build suggests a standard street motorcycle suitable for urban environments. The design is streamlined yet practical, with all essential components clearly defined.
description: A classic red and silver motorcycle with a brown seat, spoked wheels, and detailed engine and exhaust components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, red tank, brown seat, silver frame, and both wheels with detailed spokes.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the handlebars, headlight, front tire, and the narrow profile of the seat and tank.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the engine and exhaust, with the same color scheme.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the brown seat, rear fender, taillight, and the back tire, with the exhaust pipe visible on the right.
